steps.t: Honey-bell is probably somewhere in the Beorning-lands, beyond Sterkist's sight. You should find some sign of Honey-bell's wanderings.
Sterkist can be found at the Beorninghús. You should show Sterkist the bell you found.
Haldis can be found at the Beorninghús. You should talk to Haldis about where she found Honey-bell.
Honey-bell can be found at the Beorninghús. You should give Honey-bell a good pat.
Sterkist can be found at the Beorninghús. You should talk to Sterkist.
